ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel where the conversation took place (e.g., social media platform) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conversation was last updated */,
  "topic" TEXT /* The main topic of the conversation */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the conversation (e.g., ACTIVE, ARCHIVED) */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* The privacy setting of the conversation (e.g., PUBLIC, PRIVATE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation the message belongs to */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Event ID of the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the message */,
  "message_length" INTEGER /* Length of the message */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the conversation */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of message (e.g., TEXT, IMAGE) */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* The actual content of the message */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* A score indicating the sentiment of the message */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the message is flagged for review */,
  "thread_id" TEXT /* The ID of the thread the message belongs to, if applicable */,
  "parent_message_id" TEXT /* The ID of the parent message in a thread, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender FOREIGN KEY ("sender") REFERENCES senders ("sender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "senders" (
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sender */,
  "sender_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sender */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sender was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sender was last updated */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity by the sender */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the sender (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message the metadata belongs to */,
  "prev_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the previous message */,
  "prev_sender" TEXT /* Sender of the previous message */,
  "time_delay_seconds" INTEGER /* Time delay between the current and previous message in seconds */,
  "time_delay_mins" INTEGER /* Time delay between the current and previous message in minutes */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week the message was sent */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* Year and month the message was sent */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Whether the message was sent on a weekend */,
  "entity_count" INTEGER /* The number of entities in the message */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* A label indicating the sentiment of the message (e.g., POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, NEUTRAL) */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the message */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the message is important */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the message is spam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_metadata_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the channel was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the channel (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversation_channels" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the channel is the default channel for the conversation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id", "channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the message type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the message type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sender in the conversation */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant joined the conversation */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant left the conversation */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the participant (e.g., ACTIVE, LEFT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id", "sender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversation_history" (
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event in the conversation history */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., MESSAGE_SENT, MESSAGE_RECEIVED, PARTICIPANT_JOINED, PARTICIPANT_LEFT) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id", "timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the user is an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the conversation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., VIEW, EDIT) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the access */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message the entity belongs to */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., PERSON, ORGANIZATION) */,
  "entity_value" TEXT /* Value of the entity */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence of the entity extraction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_entities_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)
